Scoring: at game end my victory display contained only 'Field of Graves' (Victory 1) and nothing else was banked (Cellar still had 1 clue, no enemies defeated). Yet ./ahlcg score reported xp: 3 (score 2 after 1 mental trauma). Expected xp ~1 from a single Victory-1 location. Possibly a no_resolution XP bonus is intended, but the 3 XP from 1 victory point seems higher than the victory display justifies — flagging in case the XP calc is over-counting.
